fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your provider API key. Stored encrypted.

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override the default API endpoint. Leave blank to use the provider default (e.g. for Ollama/OpenWebUI: http://host.docker.internal:3000).

fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, gemini-2.0-flash-lite, qwen2.5. Leave blank to use the provider default.

fields.label: Fallback 1 Provider
fields.description: Provider for the first fallback model. Leave blank to use the same provider as primary.

fields.label: Fallback 1 Model
fields.description: If the default model fails, retry with this model. Leave blank to disable fallback.

fields.label: Fallback Model API Key
fields.description: API key for the fallback model if it uses a different provider or key. Leave blank to reuse the main API Key.

fields.label: Fallback 1 Base URL
fields.description: API endpoint for the fallback model (e.g. https://api.moonshot.ai/v1/chat/completions for Kimi international). Leave blank to reuse the main Base URL.

fields.label: Fallback 2 Provider
fields.description: Provider for the second fallback model. Leave blank to disable second fallback.

fields.label: Fallback 2 Model
fields.description: Model name for the second fallback. Leave blank to disable.

fields.label: Fallback 2 API Key
fields.description: API key for the second fallback provider. Leave blank to reuse the main API Key.

fields.label: Fallback 2 Base URL
fields.description: API endpoint for the second fallback model. Leave blank to use provider default.

fields.label: System Prompt
fields.description: The AI's personality and instructions. Leave blank to use the built-in default prompt.
